description.from: Attacks all frontal enemies in a straight line, dealing ??? P.DMG and stunning them for 3 sec. If the target is not a Hero, deals ??? additional P.DMG. [Experiment Success!] Removes Cooldown
description.to:
Deals 739*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+355.4% ATK Physical DMG to enemies in a frontal straight-line area and stuns them for 1sec. Non-hero enemies take additional 339*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+185.4% ATK Physical DMG.

[Experiment Success!]: This skill does not trigger a cooldown.

description.from: Deals ??? P.DMG to target and nearby enemies within range and inflict them with [Explosive Meterial] for 10 sec, causing them to take 20% increased P.DMG and additional inflicting Blind for 4 sec. [Experiment Success!] Dispels positive effects from enemies within range.
description.to:
Deals 443*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+213.5% ATK Physical DMG to the target and nearby enemies, inflicting [Explosive Substance] for 7sec, increasing Physical DMG taken by 20% and inflicting Blind for 1sec.

[Experiment Success!]: Removes beneficial effects from enemies within the area.

description.from: Attaches a Glue Bomb to a random enemy that explodes in 3 sec, dealing ??? P.DMG to the target and nearby enemies, inflicting Stun for 3 sec. If the target is inflicted with [Explosive Material], deals ??? additional P.DMG. [Experiment Success!] Glue Bomb explodes immediately after attachment.
description.to:
Attaches a sticky bomb to a random enemy.
After 3sec, the bomb explodes, dealing 1500*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+755.2% ATK Physical DMG to the target and nearby enemies, and stunning them for 1sec. Enemies afflicted with [Explosive Substance] take additional 1001*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+477.5% ATK Physical DMG.

[Experiment Success!]: The bomb explodes immediately upon attachment.

description.from: Each auto attack has a 15% chance of firing a bomb that deals ??? P.DMG and stuns them for 2 sec. After each Skill use, Lakrak conducts an experiment. The experiment has a 50% success rate. Upon success, enhances the effects of the next Skill use. Experiment does not occur when Lakrak uses the enhanced Skill.
description.to:
When performing a Normal Attack, has a 15% chance to fire a shell, dealing 345*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+166.3% ATK Physical DMG to the target and nearby enemies, and stunning them for 1sec.
Each time a skill ends, attempts [Experiment] with a 50% chance to succeed, enhancing the next skill. Enhanced skills do not attempt [Experiment].

dark.from: Blind duration is increased by 2 sec.
dark.to: Increases the duration of Blind by 1 sec.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1, and attacks a random target 2 times.
light.to: Mana cost increases by 2000, and the number of bomb placements is changed to 2.

light.from: Activation chance is boosted by 10% and stun duration increases by 1 sec.
light.to: Shell activation chance increases by 25%, and stun duration increases by 0.5 sec.

description.from: [Rapid Fire] Increases DMG by 50% and restores {0} mana on critical hit
description.to: [Rapid Fire] Increases DMG by 50%, and recovers {0} Mana upon a Critical Hit.

description.from: [Smoke Bomb] Reduces Cooldown by 30% and increases blind duration by {0} sec.
description.to: [Smoke Bomb] Reduces Cooldown by 30% and increases the duration of Blind by {0} sec.

description.from: [Glue Bomb] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Heal Rate of the hit target by {0}% for 7 sec.
description.to: [Glue Bomb] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces the Heal Rate of the hit target by {0}% for 7 sec.

dark.from: Each time Lakrak succeed an Experiment, his attack rate increase by 300 for 10 sec.
dark.to: On [Experiment] success, increases Attack Speed by 12% and Status Ailment Accuracy by 150 for 10 sec.

description.from: Lakrak's chances of successful Experiment are increased by {0}%, and each successful experiment increases his ATK by {1}%, ATK Spd by {2} and damage against none-Heroes by {3}%. This effect can stack up to 4 times and is irremovable.
description.to:
[Experiment] success chance is increased by {0}%.
On [Experiment] success, Attack increases by {1}%, Attack Speed by {2}%, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by {3}%. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.
